welcome: 👋 Welcome, {name}! I can help you find and download images and videos from Pinterest and other sites. 📝 How to use: • Send me any search query (e.g., 'cats', 'beautiful landscapes') • Or send me a URL from Pinterest, Instagram, Twitter, and many other sites • I'll show you {batch_size} items at a time • Use the buttons to see more or start a new search 🔍 Try it now: Send me a search term or URL!
help: 🤖 Pinterest Bot Help Commands: /start - Start the bot /help - Show this help /language - Change language /new - Start a new search /stop - Stop current search How to search: • Simply type what you want to find! Examples: 'sunset beach', 'cute puppies' • Or paste a URL from supported sites Examples: Pinterest, Instagram, Twitter, etc. Features: • Shows {batch_size} items per batch • Supports images and videos • Download buttons for each item • Share files with friends • Continue or stop anytime
no_images_found: ❌ No images found. Please try a different search term.
no_media_from_url: ❌ No media found at this URL. Please check the link and try again.
no_images_available: ❌ No images available at the moment.
no_media_available: ❌ No media available at the moment.
no_more_images: ✨ No more items to show. Use /new to start another search!
session_expired: ⚠️ Your session has expired. Please start a new search.
search_stopped: ⏹️ Search stopped. Use /new to start another search!
ready_for_search: 🆕 Ready for new search! Send me a search term or URL.
file_not_found_with_link: ⚠️ File {filename} not found on server. You can download it directly: Download Link
failed_to_send_with_link: ⚠️ Failed to send {filename}. You can download it directly: Download Link
share_instructions: 📤 Share file: {filename} Click the button below and select a chat to share this file.
empty_query: Please enter a search query or URL.
